faqs.question: How much does silverfish control cost in Fresh Meadows?
faqs.answer: Silverfish control in Fresh Meadows typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size of your home or apartment, the severity of the infestation, and the number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Why do I have silverfish in my Fresh Meadows home?
faqs.answer: Silverfish are attracted to moisture and humidity, which are common in Fresh Meadows bathrooms, basements, laundry rooms, and older buildings with ventilation issues. They feed on starches, paper, glue, and fabrics, making homes with books, cardboard boxes, and stored items particularly vulnerable to infestation.

faqs.question: Are your silverfish treatments safe for families and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for children and pets when used as directed. Our technicians will provide clear instructions on any necessary precautions, and we can discuss pet- and child-friendly treatment options during your inspection.
